commands.review_summary:
The PR filters invalid or unreadable runtime tool schemas before provider normalization in assistant attempts, compaction, quarantine logging, and doctor runtime checks, with focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +346, Tests +413. Total +759 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main can read/normalize tool schemas before quarantine, and the PR head still builds bundled reserved names from surviving normalized tools only; I did not run tests in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can address the remaining name-reservation bug; maintainer review is still needed for the compatibility policy decision.

target.title: fix(agents): quarantine invalid runtime tool schemas
target.body:
## Summary

- Quarantines invalid/unserializable runtime tool schemas before provider/model startup so one bad active tool does not crash the assistant turn before content.
- Applies the same quarantine shape to compaction/runtime tool paths and preserves readable healthy sibling tools.
- Keeps omitted tool names reserved so MCP/LSP/bundled tools cannot reintroduce a quarantined name through later runtime construction.

## Verification

- Temporarily stacked on #88649 (`test-neutral-tool-schema-fixtures-refresh-20260531`) so this PR's visible diff stays focused on runtime quarantine; retarget to `main` after #88649 lands.
- Rebased stack onto current `origin/main` at `b9dc3c38940`; pushed head `268b2c854b1fb63491121682fdd40b6707dabdb`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts`: passed, 3 routed shards / 163 tests.
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check $(cat /tmp/runtime-quarantine-stacked-files.txt)`: passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs $(cat /tmp/runtime-quarantine-stacked-files.txt)`: passed.
- `git diff --check refresh-neutral-fixtures-current...HEAD`: passed.
- Runtime PR diff scrub against the #88649 base found no reported private plugin/tool name or private path/network literals.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base refresh-neutral-fixtures-current`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- Lane note: the full stacked branch includes #88649's test-only fixture cleanup until #88649 lands, so `changed-lanes` from `origin/main` sees `core`, `coreTests`, and `extensionTests`; the PR diff against #88649 is runtime-only.
- CI boundary: broad CI is currently red from the same unrelated current-main dependency/type failures as #88649 and latest `main` run `26716918236` (`check-dependencies` reports unused `ui/src/ui/browser-redact.ts`; `check-test-types` reports `ui/src/ui/control-ui-vite-config.node.test.ts` Vite hook typing). These files are outside this runtime-quarantine PR's diff.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: invalid active tool schemas are filtered and logged before provider normalization/model startup, and healthy sibling tools continue to run.

Real environment tested: local linked gwt worktree with focused changed-file runtime/doctor/compaction tests.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts`; `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check $(cat /tmp/runtime-quarantine-stacked-files.txt)`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs $(cat /tmp/runtime-quarantine-stacked-files.txt)`; `git diff --check refresh-neutral-fixtures-current...HEAD`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base refresh-neutral-fixtures-current`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests cover provider-normalizable filtering, quarantine logging, readable tool-name handling, compaction schema quarantine, and doctor/runtime warning paths.

Observed result after fix: focused changed test files, formatting, lint, diff check, scrub, and autoreview passed after the latest rebase/push.

What was not tested: no clean broad `pnpm check:changed` run after the rebase; the branch is intentionally stacked behind #88649 until that fixture cleanup lands, and current `main` CI is red in unrelated dependency/type jobs.
